mapper.sql: seal.electronic_seal_id AS electronicSealId, seal.tenant_id AS tenantId, seal.seal_name AS sealName, seal.seal_type AS sealType, seal.provider_code AS providerCode, seal.provider_seal_id AS providerSealId, seal.certificate_serial AS certificateSerial, seal.valid_from AS validFrom, seal.valid_until AS validUntil, seal.status AS status, seal.custodian_user_id AS custodianUserId, COALESCE(custodian.nick_name, custodian.user_name) AS custodianName, seal.committee_term_name AS committeeTermName, seal.simulated AS simulated, seal.created_by_user_id AS createdByUserId, seal.create_time AS createTime, seal.update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_committee_electronic_seal seal JOIN sys_user custodian ON custodian.user_id = seal.custodian_user_id WHERE seal.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CASE seal.status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, seal.seal_type, seal.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_committee_seal_usage ( tenant_id, electronic_seal_id, seal_name, business_type, business_id, sealing_method, source_attachment_id, sealed_attachment_id, source_file_hash, sealed_file_hash, provider_transaction_id, certificate_serial, verification_status, simulated, operator_user_id, remark ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{electronicSealId}, #{sealName}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{sealingMethod}, #{sourceAttachmentId}, #{sealedAttachmentId}, #{sourceFileHash}, #{sealedFileHash}, #{providerTransactionId}, #{certificateSerial}, #{verificationStatus}, #{simulated}, #{operatorUserId}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT usage.usage_id AS usageId, usage.tenant_id AS tenantId, usage.electronic_seal_id AS electronicSealId, usage.seal_name AS sealName, usage.business_type AS businessType, usage.business_id AS businessId, CASE WHEN usage.business_type = 'REPAIR' THEN repair.title ELSE NULL END AS businessTitle, usage.sealing_method AS sealingMethod, usage.source_attachment_id AS sourceAttachmentId, usage.sealed_attachment_id AS sealedAttachmentId, usage.source_file_hash AS sourceFileHash, usage.sealed_file_hash AS sealedFileHash, usage.provider_transaction_id AS providerTransactionId, usage.certificate_serial AS certificateSerial, usage.verification_status AS verificationStatus, usage.simulated AS simulated, usage.operator_user_id AS operatorUserId, COALESCE(operator.nick_name, operator.user_name) AS operatorName, usage.remark AS remark, usage.create_time AS createTime FROM t_committee_seal_usage usage JOIN sys_user operator ON operator.user_id = usage.operator_user_id LEFT JOIN t_repair_work_order repair ON usage.business_type = 'REPAIR' AND repair.work_order_id = usage.business_id WHERE usage.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY usage.create_time DESC, usage.usage_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
